summary: Phase 13 — Onboarding cycle + Digital Twin enrichment fully verified. Backend: 9/9 new tests pass (twin_status enrichment, fresh-client E2E, needs_revision flow) + 14/14 Phase 12 regression still green = 23/23 PASS. Frontend Playwright: empty state, cycle-preview (4 steps), PropertyManagerModal open, twin-cta with request-twin-btn, INACTIV pill, lock overlay, post-request ÎN VALIDARE state, operator approve, post-approve LIVE 3D + CTA/lock hidden, bottom-nav regression — ALL verified. Zero regressions.

backend.TestTwinStatusEnrichment.test_properties: PASS (every property has twin_status ∈ {null, pending_validation, approved, needs_revision})
backend.TestFreshClientFullCycle.test_step4_oper: PASS (GET /operator/twins includes prop_id with status=pending_validation + enriched property_name)
backend.TestFreshClientFullCycle.test_step5_oper: PASS (POST /operator/twins/{id}/validate action=approve → client GET shows twin_status=approved AND twin_unlocked=true)
backend.TestNeedsRevisionFlow.test_needs_revisio: PASS (action=request_revision → needs_revision; resubmit → back to pending_validation)

frontend.STEP_A_empty_state_renders: PASS (onboarding-empty + onboarding-add-prop visible; 'Începe cu prima ta proprietate' heading)
frontend.STEP_A_cycle_preview_4_steps: PASS (cycle-preview contains Proprietate, Digital Twin, Servicii, Escrow)
frontend.STEP_B_onboarding_add_opens_modal: PASS (click → PropertyManagerModal dialog 'Proprietățile mele' renders; screenshot captured)
frontend.STEP_C_after_add_twin_cta_visible: PASS (twin-cta count=1 with 'Activează Digital Twin gratuit' copy; request-twin-btn count=1; INACTIV badge=1; 'Twin neactivat' lock=1)
frontend.STEP_D_request_twin_changes_state: PASS (after click: ÎN VALIDARE badge=2 (header+cycle), twin-cta morphs to 'Twin în validare la operator', request-twin-btn removed; backend confirms twin_status=pending_validation)
frontend.STEP_E_operator_approves: PASS (POST /operator/twins/{id}/validate returns 200; 9 twin-cards visible on operator dashboard)
frontend.STEP_F_client_sees_LIVE_3D: PASS (LIVE 3D count=1, twin-cta count=0 (correctly hidden), lock count=0 (correctly hidden))

critical_code_review_comments: ClientDashboard.jsx is 647 lines with multiple inner components (RequestZone, CyclePreview, JobsZone etc.) — consider splitting CyclePreview into its own file for reuse and testability. Not blocking.

PropertyManagerModal opens to a list view first (Phase 11 design). User must click a second 'Adaugă proprietate' button inside the modal to reveal the actual form. This is existing behavior, not a Phase 13 regression, but UX wise a fresh-user could expect the form to be immediately visible since there are zero properties.
server.py list_properties already exits cleanly with O(1+1) DB queries (one for properties, one batched twins.find with $in) — good. No N+1 concerns.
twin_status field properly returns None (not 'null' string) for properties without a twin doc — matches frontend expectation.
seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_Phase13* clients via /api/auth/register (cleanup-safe: only TEST_ prefixed properties; users left but harmless — no admin self-delete endpoint expected). All test properties deleted in fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 13 testids: onboarding-empty, onboarding-add-prop, cycle-preview, twin-cta, request-twin-btn, resubmit-twin. Backend enrichment: GET /api/properties now returns twin_status per property (joins db.twins). PropertyManagerModal opens to LIST view first — to create from empty state, click onboarding-add-prop → modal opens → click the inner '+ Adaugă proprietate' to reveal form. Operator validate accepts action='approve' or action='request_revision' (NOT 'reject'). Operator twin-card-{prop_id} testids are scoped to specific tabs (pending vs approved) so total count varies; check by visiting both tabs if needed.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Phase 13 implementation matches spec: backend twin_status enrichment works, full E2E cycle (register → empty → add → request → operator approve → LIVE 3D) verified end-to-end, all 5 visual states (empty, INACTIV+CTA, ÎN VALIDARE, NECESITĂ REVIZIE/resubmit, LIVE 3D) reachable. User's complaint about 'nu vad butonul unde sa adaug o proprietate' is fully addressed by the big onboarding-empty card with the prominent onboarding-add-prop button.
